messages.text: You draw the unlight reaver across {target} and its lightless edge drinks the wound cold as it opens. Your strike {verb} them!
{source} draws an unlight reaver across you and its edge leaves a cold, numb wound in its wake. The blows {verb} you!
{source} draws a lightless reaver across {target}, and the blade seems to drink the light around it.
You sweep the unlight reaver at {target} and its dark edge hisses through empty air.
{source} sweeps an unlight reaver at you and the lightless blade passes by.
{source} sweeps a lightless reaver at {target} and misses.
You bury the unlight reaver in {target} and the cold of the void erupts along the blade! Your strike {verb} them!
{source} buries an unlight reaver in you and the cold of the void erupts through you! The blows {verb} you!
{source} buries a lightless reaver in {target} and the dark bursts along the blade!
